docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $128.00 FILED BY TAYLOR CAMILLA AS TO DEFENDANT BALY'S FACIAL NAIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-18-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
